title: Boeing stock turns up to lead the Dow's winners after WSJ report United Airlines close to big 787 order
text: Shares of Boeing Co. BA, +3.33% surged 3.5% toward a more than seven-month high in midday trading, reversing an earlier loss of as much as 1.7%, after The Wall Street Journal reported that United Airlines Holdings Inc. UAL, -1.21% close to ordering "dozens" of Boeing 787 Dreamliners. The aerospace giant's stock paced the Dow Jones Industrial Average's DJIA, -0.30% gainers, with the price gain of $6.06 adding ab out 40 points to the price of the Dow, which was down 98 points, or 0.3%.
